title: Incident: Memory Explosion from Cardinality
description: Unique series count grew from 50K to 5M in 8 hours after deployment

timeline.00:00: Deployment of new tracing feature that adds request_id and trace_id to metrics
timeline.00:00-04:00: Series count climbs to 500K, memory at 800MB
timeline.04:00-08:00: Exponential growth continues, series reach 5M, memory at 3.2GB
timeline.08:30: Prometheus becomes unresponsive, on-call engineer investigating

problematic_labels.label: request_id
problematic_labels.uniqueness: Every request gets a different value
problematic_labels.impact: Creates 2M separate time series per metric

problematic_labels.label: trace_id
problematic_labels.impact: Creates 1.5M separate time series per metric

analysis: Each unique request_id creates a new time series. With 2M requests/hour and 8 hours = 16M request_ids, metrics explosion is inevitable
